_translations.title: Domain Events
_translations.description: Public domain events published by Lana Bank
_translations.intro: Lana Bank publishes domain events via the transactional outbox pattern. These events can be consumed by external systems for integration, analytics, and audit purposes.
_translations.serialization_note: All events are serialized as JSON and include metadata for tracing and ordering.
_translations.event_structure_intro: Each event is wrapped in an envelope with the following structure:
_translations.event_types_intro: All event types follow the naming convention:
_translations.consuming_intro: Events are published via the transactional outbox and can be consumed through:
_translations.contact_note: For integration details, contact the platform team.

CoreAccessEvent.module_description: Events related to user and role management.

CoreCreditEvent.module_description: Events related to credit facility lifecycle and operations.

events.FacilityProposalCreated: A credit facility proposal was created
events.FacilityProposalConcluded: A credit facility proposal was concluded
events.FacilityCompleted: A credit facility was fully repaid and closed
events.PendingCreditFacilityCollateralizationCh: Collateralization state changed for pending facility
events.PendingCreditFacilityCompleted: A pending credit facility was completed
events.FacilityCollateralizationChanged: Collateralization state changed for active facility
events.DisbursalApprovalConcluded: A disbursal approval process was concluded

CoreCreditCollateralEvent.module_description: Events related to credit facility collateral management and liquidation.

CoreCreditCollectionEvent.module_description: Events related to credit facility obligations and payment collection.

CoreCustodyEvent.module_description: Events related to Bitcoin custody and wallet management.

CoreCustomerEvent.module_description: Events related to customer lifecycle and KYC.

events.CustomerFrozen: A customer account was frozen, blocking financial operations
events.CustomerUnfrozen: A previously frozen customer account was unfrozen, restoring normal operations

CoreDepositEvent.module_description: Events related to deposit accounts and transactions.

CorePriceEvent.module_description: Events related to BTC/USD price updates.

events.EndOfDay: End of day was reached for the configured timezone
